name: Strawberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour and next four ingredients (sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, salt) and stir well.
2. Add the sliced fresh strawberries; stir until combined.
3. Make a well in the center of the dry mixture.
4. In another bowl, combine the buttermilk and remaining ingredients (margarine, vanilla extract, lightly beaten egg, egg white); stir until smooth.
5. Pour the liquid mixture into the well of the dry mixture, stirring just until moistened.
6. Divide the batter evenly among 18 muffin cups coated with cooking spray.
7. Sprinkle 1-1/2 tablespoons sugar evenly over each muffin.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from pans immediately and let cool on a wire rack.
Yield: 1-1/2 dozen
